title: From Wallet to Wheel in Four Steps

items.title: Connect Wallet
items.description: Link a Web3 wallet like MetaMask. CodeCroupier never asks for your keys.

items.title: Acquire C-Chip
items.description: Swap for $CCHIP to fund your table balance, fully visible on-chain.

items.title: Place Your Bet
items.description: Choose a number, color, or spread on the roulette table and confirm the transaction.

items.title: Watch the Contract Settle
items.description: The wheel spins, the contract emits the result, and payouts settle directly to your wallet.
